title: 🎵 Sonic Atmosphere & Smooth Motion Update! ⚡
message: Timekeeping just got a major performance boost! We've overhauled our animation matrix for ultra-fluid digit transitions and fine-tuned our audio engine for maximum fidelity during your deep work sessions.
points: ⚡ Snappy Motion Overhaul: Refactored individual digit transition tracking blocks across all 24 clock animations to ensure buttery-smooth updates and zero frame drops on high-refresh-rate displays.
🎧 Premium Audio Fidelity: Fine-tuned the soundscape playback mixer stream to provide crystal-clear environmental audio tracking, even when pushing the volume mixer into boost levels.
🚀 Fast Boot Toggle: Added a quick configuration switch right in the header bar to skip the splash video, bypassing initialization straight to the dashboard workspace instantly.
🛡️ Safe Fallback Streams: Reworked advertisement pipeline lifecycle hooks to handle offline and fill exceptions seamlessly without locking you out of clock and custom timer features.

title: 🎨 The 'Match Your Setup' Color Update! 📸
message: Transform your workspace cohesion! You can now choose a photo of your actual desk environment from your gallery, and Tymio will automatically adapt its custom colors to blend right in.
points: 📸 Match Your Setup: Added an intelligent local color picker plugin option inside your studio design tab header to extract dominant, vibrant accents directly from your real-world desk photos.
📱 Safe Tree Guards: Injected lifecycle mount state-verification checks across custom theme switches to secure continuous app performance and keep animations stable for long ambient desk sessions.

title: ⚡ The Fast-Boot & Ad Control Update! 🚀
message: We've added a brand-new fast boot option, upgraded our premium click limits, and introduced enhanced network security locks for a cleaner experience.
points: ⚡ Fast-Boot Bypass: Added a Splash Screen Toggle button to the top action bar so you can disable the video intro and skip straight to your clocks on startup.
🔁 Smart Feedback Loop: Refactored the rating prompt logic into a rolling 3-day window to cleanly space out review reminders based on your active usage timeline.

title: ⚡ The Seamless Flow Update! 🚀
message: We've rolled out essential under-the-hood polish and initialization safeguards to keep your app loading securely and swiftly across all devices.
points: ⚡ Startup Guard: Resolved a rare background synchronization bug to ensure your focus engines load smoothly from the absolute first launch.
🔧 Platform Alignment: Enhanced core plugin channel routing rules to fix unhandled native exceptions on specific Android versions.
📱 Memory Optimization: Cleaned up background lifecycle threads for reduced system footprints and maximum idle battery savings.
🧹 Framework Stability: General code refactoring to protect live counter views from unexpected termination behaviors.

title: ✨ The Chrono Precision Update! ⏱️
message: We've fine-tuned our engine tracking and tailored the interfaces to ensure every single tick of your clock stays buttery-smooth.
points: ⏱️ Zero-Guard Counter Fix: Resolved a bug where the countdown timer could become unresponsive or trigger incorrectly when resting at absolute zero.
📅 Immersive Event Tracker: Smart-hiding controls now automatically clear away play/pause configurations when tracking non-stoppable future date events.
🎨 Compact Input Formats: Re-engineered layout padding inside the custom duration dials to eliminate text clipping across varied device displays.
🧼 Clean Capture Mode: Enhanced screen-sharing workflows to drop system elements cleanly so you can display your personalized focus dashboard.

title: ✨ The Zenith Update Hub! 🚀
message: We've crafted a beautiful new way to keep you perfectly in sync with our latest clocks, timers, and focus tools.
points: 🔔 In-App Updater: Get instantly notified about fresh features directly from the home screen.
📖 Cinematic Changelogs: Discover exactly what's new the moment you update your app.
🔄 Manual Check: Check for new versions anytime with the new dynamic status icon.
⚡ Performance Boost: Under-the-hood tweaks for an even smoother, distraction-free experience.
